channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP's Jack Smith referral lacks evidence of a crime, ex-prosecutors say
item.description: Former prosecutors say the Justice Department would face challenges prosecuting Jack Smith based on allegations from House Republicans.

item.title: Democratic Party recruits social media influencers for 2028 campaign
item.description: The Democratic National Committee expands its influencer program, partnering with over 500 creators ahead of the midterms and the 2028 election.

item.title: Trump threatens Iran and Houthis amid U.S. military buildup signs
item.description: The U.S. moves more refueling planes to the Mideast and adds medics at a major military hospital as the conflict with Iran extends to another key waterway.

item.title: Epstein's former private banker appears before House Oversight Committee
item.description: The House Oversight Committee is interviewing Jes Staley, Jeffrey Epstein's former private investment banker at JPMorgan Chase.
